title: UTECHAI
subtitle: AI Film & TV Studio
heroTagline: From novel to final cut, powered by AI
heroDescription: From script writing, character design, storyboard generation to video composition — UTECHAI drives every creative step with AI, making professional film production accessible.

features.sectionSubtitle: From text to visuals, one click away

scriptToStoryboard.title: Script → Storyboard
scriptToStoryboard.description: Input story text and AI automatically parses plot structure, generating professional storyboard scripts and frame compositions

characterDesign.title: Character Workshop
characterDesign.description: Create style-consistent anime characters that maintain visual coherence across scenes

worldBuilding.title: Scene Generation
worldBuilding.description: Immersive environment generation, from streets to starfields, build grand story backgrounds

voiceSynthesis.title: AI Voice Acting
voiceSynthesis.description: Give characters unique voices with natural speech synthesis matching their personality

videoComposition.title: Video Composition
videoComposition.description: Storyboard frames auto-assembled into complete videos with smart transitions and pacing

lipsync.title: Lip Sync
lipsync.description: Character mouth movements precisely matched to voice, making animated characters truly speak

cta.title: Ready to start your AI film creation?
cta.description: Sign up for free to experience the complete creation pipeline from novel to final cut
